economic_notes: Samson Cree Nation operates multiple businesses including Gas Bar, Real Estate, Roots & Berries, Maskepetoon Automotive, Robins Donuts, Subway, Art Gallery, Bear Hills Industries, and Bingo. Nation holds Kisoniyaminaw Heritage Trust Fund (~$438.7M) and Nipisihkopahk Iyinisiwin Trust Fund (~$34.8M). KHTF advanced $5,000,000 to Nation for investment in Peace Hills General Insurance Company preferred shares. Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company excluded from consolidation despite PSAB requirements — if included, accumulated surplus would increase by $143,396,553.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) Peace Hills Trust Company and Peace Hills General Insurance Company are excluded from consolidation contrary to PSAB standards — inclusion would increase accumulated surplus by $143,396,553; (2) A court judgment for overpaid royalties of $7,961,316 has not been recorded as a liability as the Nation is appealing. Accumulated surplus figure of 588,276,097 excludes accumulated remeasurement losses of $28,695,965, giving total accumulated surplus per balance sheet of $559,580,132. The total accumulated surplus including remeasurement gains/losses is $559,580,132. Trust funds (KHTF ~$438.7M and NITF ~$34.8M) are the dominant financial assets. Large unrealized investment losses in KHTF during FY2020 drove remeasurement losses. OSR calculated as total revenue $100,752,232 minus total government transfers $45,639,988.
